paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tent of meeting, on the first day of the second month, in the second year after they were come out of the land of Egypt, saying,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Take ye the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, every male, by their polls;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: from twenty years old and upward, all that are able to go forth to war in Israel, thou and Aaron shall number them by their hosts.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And with you there shall be a man of every tribe; every one head of his fathers` house.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the names of the men that shall stand with you. Of Reuben: Elizur the son of Shedeur.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Simeon: Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Judah: Nahshon the son of Amminadab.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Issachar: Nethanel the son of Zuar.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Zebulun: Eliab the son of Helon.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Joseph: Of Ephraim: Elishama the son of Ammihud. Of Manasseh: Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Benjamin: Abidan the son of Gideoni.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Dan: Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Asher: Pagiel the son of Ochran.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Gad: Eliasaph the son of Deuel.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of Naphtali: Ahira the son of Enan.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are they that were called of the congregation, the princes of the tribes of their fathers; they were the heads of the thousands of Israel.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Moses and Aaron took these men that are mentioned by name:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And they assembled all the congregation together on the first day of the second month; and they declared their pedigrees after their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, by their polls.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: As Jehovah commanded Moses, so he numbered them in the wilderness of Sinai.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the children of Reuben, Israel`s first-born, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, by their polls, every male from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Reuben, were forty and six thousand and five hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Simeon, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, those that were numbered thereof, according to the number of the names, by their polls, every male from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Simeon, were fifty and nine thousand and three hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Gad, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Gad, were forty and five thousand six hundred and fifty.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Judah, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Judah, were threescore and fourteen thousand and six hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Issachar, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Issachar, were fifty and four thousand and four hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Zebulun, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Zebulun, were fifty and seven thousand and four hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Joseph, [namely], of the children of Ephraim, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Ephraim, were forty thousand and five hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Manasseh, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Manasseh, were thirty and two thousand and two hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Benjamin, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Benjamin, were thirty and five thousand and four hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Dan, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Dan, were threescore and two thousand and seven hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Asher, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Asher, were forty and one thousand and five hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the children of Naphtali, their generations, by their families, by their fathers` houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Naphtali, were fifty and three thousand and four hundred.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are they that were numbered, whom Moses and Aaron numbered, and the princes of Israel, being twelve men: they were each one for his fathers` house.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: So all they that were numbered of the children of Israel by their fathers` houses, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war in Israel;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: even all they that were numbered were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But the Levites after the tribe of their fathers were not numbered among them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: For Jehovah spake unto Moses, saying,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Only the tribe of Levi thou shalt not number, neither shalt thou take the sum of them among the children of Israel;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: but appoint thou the Levites over the tabernacle of the testimony, and over all the furniture thereof, and over all that belongeth to it: they shall bear the tabernacle, and all the furniture thereof; and they shall minister unto it, and shall encamp round about the tabernacle.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And when the tabernacle setteth forward, the Levites shall take it down; and when the tabernacle is to be pitched, the Levites shall set it up: and the stranger that cometh nigh shall be put to death.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the children of Israel shall pitch their tents, every man by his own camp, and every man by his own standard, according to their hosts.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But the Levites shall encamp round about the tabernacle of the testimony, that there be no wrath upon the congregation of the children of Israel: and the Levites shall keep the charge of the tabernacle of the testimony.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thus did the children of Israel; according to all that Jehovah commanded Moses, so did they.
